query: I am folding laundry by the washer and want to get the lights and blinds ready before I carry the drying rack through. Get dimmer light 1 in bedroom powered on at level 100 8 minutes from now and keep it on but bump it to level 90 21 minutes after the previous action so I can inspect the sheets under bright light. Also move blinds 1 in living room to 40.0% closed 17 minutes from now and change it to 5.0% closed 16 minutes after the previous action so the front room does not glare when I walk in.

steps.thought: I need to verify room IDs and find the exact device IDs for 'dimmer light 1 in bedroom' and 'blinds 1 in living room'. I will start by getting the list of rooms.
I need to find the device ID for the dimmer light in the bedroom.
I need to find the device ID for the blinds in the living room.
I need to check the clusters and commands/attributes for the dimmable light to know how to set the brightness level.
I need to check the clusters and attributes for the living room blinds to determine how to set the percentage closed.
Scheduling the first action: turn on bedroom dimmable light 1 at level 100, 8 minutes from now (09:58:57).
Scheduling the second action: set bedroom dimmable light 1 to level 90, 21 minutes after the first action (10:19:57).
Scheduling the third action: move living room blinds 1 to 40.0% closed, 17 minutes from now (10:07:57).
Scheduling the fourth action: move living room blinds 1 to 5.0% closed, 16 minutes after the previous action (10:23:57).
All four scheduled workflows have been successfully created. I can now provide the final confirmation to the user.
